target_boundary.population: JSON objects containing one text field
target_boundary.admissible_states: one stateless process invocation per case
target_boundary.observable_outputs: one JSON object containing one text field
target_boundary.expected_outcome: convert cased characters to uppercase and preserve other characters

required_criteria.oracle: candidate exits zero and emits the exact expected JSON object

assumptions: the Python runtime supplies stable Unicode uppercasing for these fixed ASCII cases
